title: Device Home Screen - Device images
scenario: Device images fail to load or display incorrectly on the Device Home Screen when device is turned off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Pair a Poly Bluetooth audio device with the app.
5. Observe the device image displayed on the Home screen.
6. Turn the paired device OFF (e.g., press and hold the Power button).
7. Return to the Home screen and observe the device image again.
expected: 1. With internet ON, the device image loads properly and is fully displayed on the Home screen. 2. After turning the device OFF, the device image is still properly displayed but greyed out.
